parameters.query:
SELECT title, url, source
FROM discoveries
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 8;

parameters.jsCode:
const articles = $input.all().map(item => item.json); const grouped = articles.map((a, i) => `${i + 1}. ${a.title} (${a.source})` ).join('\n'); const prompt = ` You are a senior frontend editor writing a high-quality weekly newsletter. Using the articles below: ${grouped} Write a concise, insight-driven HTML newsletter. STRICT RULES: Use this exact structure:

Frontend Weekly

⚡ Performance & Tooling

🤖 AI & Developer Experience

🧩 Architecture & Patterns

🚀 Recommended Reads

- Professional tone for senior frontend engineers - Avoid fluff - Avoid generic greetings - 350–450 words - End with CTA to elegantfrontend.training Return ONLY valid HTML. `; return [{ json: { prompt } }];
